summary: Static code analysis and structural validation of GoMode Android app - P1 Network/System redesign + LSPosed decoupling phase-1 changes. Full APK build not possible due to missing JAVA_HOME in container. Performed comprehensive code review of ModulesFragment, NetworkFragment, RootManager, and XML layouts.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: All binding references in ModulesFragment.kt match IDs in fragment_modules.xml (27 bindings verified)
PASS: All binding references in NetworkFragment.kt match IDs in fragment_network.xml (22 bindings verified)
PASS: RootManager.kt contains all required new methods: bootstrapGoModeRuntime(), getGoModeRuntimeStatus(), restartGoModeRuntime()
PASS: GoModeRuntimeStatus data class properly defined with all required fields (modulePresent, moduleEnabled, daemonRunning, runtimeDirReady, configCount, logCount, message)
PASS: Hook Engine section in fragment_modules.xml includes btn_bootstrap_runtime and btn_restart_runtime buttons with proper IDs
PASS: All color resources referenced in Kotlin code exist in colors.xml (accent, text_hint, text_secondary, green_success, bg_card, bg_dark)
PASS: All style references (@style/GodMode.CardView, @style/GodMode.Button, @style/GodMode.Button.Outlined) are defined in themes.xml
PASS: ic_refresh drawable exists and is properly referenced
PASS: XML namespace declarations are valid - app: namespace declared within CardView element scope
PASS: Coroutine usage is correct - viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launch used consistently
PASS: Null safety handled correctly with _binding pattern and null check in showLoading()
PASS: Native CMakeLists.txt properly configured for godmode_hook.so and godmoded executable
PASS: build.gradle has viewBinding and dataBinding enabled with all required dependencies

success_rate.backend: N/A - Native Android app, no web backend

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a native Android (Kotlin/C++) project. Container lacks JAVA_HOME so APK builds are blocked. Static analysis shows all code changes are structurally sound. Key validations: (1) ModulesFragment Hook Engine section with Bootstrap Runtime and Restart Daemon buttons properly wired, (2) NetworkFragment redesigned layout loads all controls, (3) RootManager has new runtime methods, (4) No XML parse/binding breakages detected. Recommend testing on actual Android device with rooted environment.

xml_layouts.fragment_modules.xml: Valid - 399 lines, no parse errors detected
xml_layouts.fragment_network.xml: Valid - 469 lines, no parse errors detected
